LAW AND MOTION, DEFENDANTS CONARD HOUSE, INC., CONARD HOUSING DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION, AND EL DORADO HOUSING CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION - SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED AS TO DEFENDANTS CONARD HOUSE AND EL DORADO HOUSING. SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED FOR CONARD HOUSING DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION. THE FEITZ DECLARATION LACKS FOUNDATION AND THE COURT SUSTAINS DEFENDANTS' OBJECTION TO THAT DECLARATION. THE COURT FINDS THT THE TESTIMONY ON PAGE 81 OF MS. ALEGRE'S DEPOSITION AND ALL OF THE EVIDENCE THEREON BARELY CREATES A TRIABLE DISPUTE AS TO BREACH OF DUTY, BUT INVOKING ALL OF THE RULES IN FAVOR OF THE NON-MOVING PARTY CREATES A TRIABLE DISPUTE AS TO CAUSATION. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER AND TO COMPLY WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185 =302/HK

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-06-2019 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Oct-11-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Atty. Andje Medina of the Advocate Trial Group LLP, Tel. No. 1-415-988-9828 appearing for the Plaintiff;
Atty. Peter F. Finn of Bradley Curley & Kowalski, Tel. No. 1-415-464-8888 appearing for the Defendant.

RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANTS CONARD HOUSE, INC., CONARD HOUSING DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION, and EL DORADO HOUSING CORPORATION's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication - Summary Judgment is Denied as to Defendants Conard House and El Dorado Housing. Summary Judgment is granted for Conard Housing Development Corporation. The Feitz declaration lacks foundation and the court sustains defendants' objection to that declaration. The court finds tht the testimony on page 81 of Ms. Alegre's deposition and all of the evidence thereon barely creates a triable dispute as to breach of duty, but invoking all of the rules in favor of the non-moving party creates a triable dispute as to causation. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order and to comply with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185 =302/hk

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-13-2018 Continued To Mar-25-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
